title: Auto Craft Tom's Addon
description: AutoCraftTomsAddon improves Tom’s Storage crafting with bulk craft buttons and a simple template system for saving and reloading recipes.
body:
AutoCraftTomAddon adds practical improvements to Tom's Storage's crafting terminal to make crafting faster and more convenient.

This version introduces a first crafting template system directly accessible from the terminal interface. You can save a craft, find it later in a dedicated list, and quickly load it again without having to place everything manually.

## Features

*   Bulk craft buttons directly below the terminal result slot.
*   Save the current craft as a template.
*   Template list accessible from a dedicated button.
*   Quick template loading with a double-click.
*   Template deletion with confirmation.
*   Local client-side template storage.

## Goal

The goal of this first version is simple: provide a clean, fast, and stable foundation without making the interface unnecessarily heavy.
